title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 06 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 06 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 06 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/06/2024
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends，the main contract closed 839.5, an increase of 0.96% throughout the day;some traders were active to sell; The inquiry from the steel mill is good, and the willingness to purchase has increased. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general. PBF at Shandong port dealt 825-835 yuan/mt; increased 2-10 yuan/mt over yesterday.
